name: XMAX V3 Pro Vaporizer
summary: A hybrid heating vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a replaceable battery, for patients wanting versatility on a budget.
description: The XMAX V3 Pro is a pen-style device using hybrid conduction and convection heating, ready in about 15 seconds. It takes dry herb, concentrates and oils, with a ceramic chamber and ceramic vapour path for clean flavour and precise manual temperature control from 180 to 220C. The replaceable 18650 battery means you can carry spares rather than wait on a charge, and it runs through one-button operation with haptic feedback. A capable all-rounder for patients who want flexibility without a flagship price.

specs.label: Warranty
specs.value: 1 Year Device Warranty and 90 Days for Battery
